entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 23:4
entries.excerpt: But set bounds for your wisdom. Namely that which is said above: Do not transgress ancient boundaries, which your fathers have set; that is, the boundaries of faith given by the fathers.

entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 23:4
entries.excerpt: Do not labor to be rich. He signifies the riches of knowledge, which we are forbidden to seek beyond the measure of our capacity.
